prose: Formaldehyde HOMO–LUMO gap computed via DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting in PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: input structure from formaldehyde.xyz used as-is (single-point). SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO energy = −7.652 eV, LUMO energy = −1.783 eV, yielding a frontier-orbital gap of 5.870 eV (Koopmans estimate of vertical excitation). No warnings reported. Trustworthy result per integrity checks.
